game_meta.name: EA Sports FC
game_meta.tagline: Football simulation. 1v1 online (FUT Rivals, Champions, Squad Battles), Pro Clubs co-op, Career single-player.
game_meta.character_vocab: formations, custom tactics, and player cards (FUT Ultimate Team build)
game_meta.round_format: 2x6 minute halves online. Career mode uses full match lengths.
key_mechanics: Custom Tactics — defending depth, width, attacking width, pressing intensity
Skill moves + finesse shots + driven shots
Set pieces — corners, free kicks, penalties

ultimate-team.name: Ultimate Team (FUT)
ultimate-team.notes: Online card-collection game mode. Rivals + Champions weekend.

pro-clubs.name: Pro Clubs
pro-clubs.notes: 11v11 co-op online. Each player controls one position.

volta.name: Volta Football
volta.notes: Street football mode. Smaller pitches, freestyle skill moves.

High-Press 4-3-3.notes: High defensive line + constant pressure. Counter risk if midfield gets bypassed.

Possession 4-2-3-1.notes: Patient passing build. Slow tempo, control midfield.

Counter 4-4-2.notes: Drop deep, hit on the break with pacy wingers.

Park the Bus 5-3-2.notes: Three CBs + wing-backs drop deep. Hard to break down.

div_10_8: Not learning the L2/LT jockey defending
Spamming finesse shots without rebound positioning
div_7_5: Bad sub timing — leaving tired strikers on
div_4_elite: Player switching to wrong CB on cutbacks

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
